            have h₅ : Finset.card T ≥ 51 := by
              simp_all
            have h₆ : ∃ a ∈ T, ∃ b ∈ T, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b) := by
              apply Finset.exists_distinct_pair_sum_is_square
              · intro x hx
                exact (h₈ x hx).1
              · intro x hx
                exact (h₈ x hx).2
              ·
                have h₇ : 2 * n ≥ 200 := by
                  linarith
                have h₈ : n ≥ 100 := by
                  linarith
                have h₉ : (2 * n + 1) - n ≥ 101 := by
                  omega
                have h₁₀ : Finset.card T ≥ 51 := by
                  simp_all
                exact h₁₀
            exact h₆
        obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, hsq⟩ := h₉
        exact ⟨a, Finset.mem_of_mem hT ha, b, Finset.mem_of_mem hT hb, hab, hsq⟩
      exact Or.inl h₅ })
  all_goals
    { have h₅ : ∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b) := by
        have h₆ : (n + 1) / 2 ≥ 51 := by
          omega
        have h₇ : Finset.card (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) ≥ 51 := by
          linarith
        obtain ⟨T, hT⟩ := Finset.exists_subset_card_eq (by linarith) h₇
        have h₈ : ∀ x ∈ T, n ≤ x ∧ x ≤ 2 * n := by
          intro x hx
          exact (Finset.mem_of_mem hT hx)
        have h₉ : ∃ a ∈ T, ∃ b ∈ T, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b) := by
          apply Finset.infinite_pigeonhole_principle
          · intro x hx
            exact (h₈ x hx).1
          · intro x hx
            exact (h₈ x hx).2
          · intro k
            use k ^ 2
            simp [IsSquare]
          ·
            intro a b ha hb hab
            intro c d hc hd hcd
            intro h
            have h₁ : a + b = c + d := by
              simp_all
            have h₂ : a = c ∧ b = d ∨ a = d ∧ b = c := by
              omega
            cases' h₂ with h₂ h₂ <;> simp_all
          ·
            have h₁ : 51 ≥ 2 := by norm_num
            have h₂ : 2 * n ≥ 200 := by
              linarith
            have h₃ : n ≥ 100 := by
              linarith
            have h₄ : (2 * n + 1) - n ≥ 101 := by
              omega
            have h₅ : Finset.card T ≥ 51 := by
              simp_all
            have h₆ : ∃ a ∈ T, ∃ b ∈ T, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b) := by

              · intro x hx
                exact (h₈ x hx).1
              · intro x hx
                exact (h₈ x hx).2
              ·
                have h₇ : 2 * n ≥ 200 := by
                  linarith
                have h₈ : n ≥ 100 := by
                  linarith
                have h₉ : (2 * n + 1) - n ≥ 101 := by
                  omega
                have h₁₀ : Finset.card T ≥ 51 := by
                  simp_all
                exact h₁₀
            exact h₆
        obtain ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, hsq⟩ := h₉
        exact ⟨a, Finset.mem_of_mem hT ha, b, Finset.mem_of_mem hT hb, hab, hsq⟩

have h₁ : ∀ k : ℕ, k ≥ 100 → ∃ m, k ≤ m^2 - k ∧ m^2 - k ≤ 2 * k := by
    intro k hk
    use Nat.ceil (Real.sqrt (2 * k))
    have h₂ : (Nat.ceil (Real.sqrt (2 * k)) : ℝ) ≥ Real.sqrt (2 * k) := by
      exact Nat.le_ceil _
    have h₃ : (Nat.ceil (Real.sqrt (2 * k)) : ℝ)^2 ≥ 2 * k := by
      calc
        (Nat.ceil (Real.sqrt (2 * k)) : ℝ)^2 ≥ (Real.sqrt (2 * k))^2 := by gcongr
        _ = 2 * k := by rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
    have h₄ : (Nat.ceil (Real.sqrt (2 * k)) : ℕ)^2 ≥ 2 * k := by
      exact_mod_cast h₃
    have h₅ : (Nat.ceil (Real.sqrt (2 * k)) : ℕ)^2 - k ≤ 2 * k := by
      omega
    have h₆ : k ≤ (Nat.ceil (Real.sqrt (2 * k)) : ℕ)^2 - k := by
      omega
    exact ⟨h₆, h₅⟩
  have h₂ : ∀ x ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n), ∃ y ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n), x ≠ y ∧ IsSquare (x + y) := by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨hx₁, hx₂⟩ := Finset.mem_Icc.mp hx
    have h₃ : x ≥ 100 := by linarith
    obtain ⟨m, hm₁, hm₂⟩ := h₁ x h₃
    use m^2 - x
    constructor
    · exact Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨hm₁, hm₂⟩
    · constructor
      · intro h
        have h₄ : m^2 = 2 * x := by linarith
        have h₅ : m^2 % 4 = 0 ∨ m^2 % 4 = 1 := by
          have h₆ : m % 4 = 0 ∨ m % 4 = 1 ∨ m % 4 = 2 ∨ m % 4 = 3 := by
            omega
          rcases h₆ with (h₆ | h₆ | h₆ | h₆) <;> simp [h₆, pow_two, Nat.mul_mod]
        have h₇ : 2 * x % 4 = 0 ∨ 2 * x % 4 = 2 := by
          have h₈ : x % 2 = 0 ∨ x % 2 = 1 := by omega
          rcases h₈ with (h₈ | h₈) <;> simp [h₈, Nat.mul_mod]
        omega
      · exact ⟨m, rfl⟩
  by_contra! h
  have h₃ : ∀ x ∈ S, ∀ y ∈ S, x = y ∨ ¬IsSquare (x + y) := by
    intro x hx y hy
    by_contra! h₄
    exact h.1 ⟨x, hx, y, hy, h₄⟩
  have h₄ : ∀ x ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∀ y ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, x = y ∨ ¬IsSquare (x + y) := by
    intro x hx y hy
    by_contra! h₅
    exact h.2 ⟨x, hx, y, hy, h₅⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := Finset.nonempty_Icc.mpr (by linarith)
  obtain ⟨y, hy₁, hy₂⟩ := h₂ x hx
  have h₅ : x ∈ S ∨ x ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
    rw [Finset.mem_diff]
    by_cases h₆ : x ∈ S <;> simp_all
  have h₆ : y ∈ S ∨ y ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := by
    rw [Finset.mem_diff]
    by_cases h₇ : y ∈ S <;> simp_all
  rcases h₅ with (h₅ | h₅) <;> rcases h₆ with (h₆ | h₆) <;>
    simp_all [h₃, h₄]

have h₁ : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) → n ≤ k ∧ k ≤ 2 * n := by
    intro k hk
    exact ⟨Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk |>.1, Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk |>.2⟩
  have h₂ : Finset.card (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)) = n + 1 := by
    simp [Finset.Icc_eq_empty_of_lt, hn]
  have h₃ : 2 * Nat.sqrt (4 * n) + 1 > n + 1 := by
    have h₄ : Nat.sqrt (4 * n) ≥ 2 * Nat.sqrt n := by
      apply Nat.le_sqrt_of_sq_le
      nlinarith [Nat.sqrt_le (4 * n), Nat.sqrt_le n]
    nlinarith [Nat.sqrt_le (4 * n), Nat.sqrt_le n, h₄]
  have h₄ : ∀ a b : ℕ, a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) → b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) → a < b → a + b ≤ 4 * n := by
    intro a b ha hb hab
    have h₅ : a ≤ 2 * n := (h₁ a ha).2
    have h₆ : b ≤ 2 * n := (h₁ b hb).2
    linarith
  have h₅ : ∀ s : Finset ℕ, s ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) → Finset.card s > Nat.sqrt (4 * n) →
      ∃ a ∈ s, ∃ b ∈ s, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b) := by
    intro s hs hcard
    have h₆ : ∀ x ∈ s, ∀ y ∈ s, x ≠ y → ¬IsSquare (x + y) → False := by
      intro x hx y hy hxy hns
      have h₇ : x + y ≤ 4 * n := h₄ x y (hs hx) (hs hy) (Ne.lt_of_le hxy)
      have h₈ : Nat.sqrt (x + y) ≤ Nat.sqrt (4 * n) := Nat.sqrt_le_sqrt h₇
      have h₉ : Finset.card s ≤ Nat.sqrt (4 * n) := by
        have h₁₀ : s.InjOn (fun z => Nat.sqrt (z + x)) := by
          intro z₁ hz₁ z₂ hz₂ h₁₁
          have h₁₂ : Nat.sqrt (z₁ + x) = Nat.sqrt (z₂ + x) := h₁₁
          have h₁₃ : z₁ + x = z₂ + x := by
            apply Nat.sqrt_inj (by linarith [h₁ z₁ (hs hz₁), h₁ x (hs hx)])
              (by linarith [h₁ z₂ (hs hz₂), h₁ x (hs hx)])
            exact h₁₂
          linarith
        have h₁₁ : Finset.card s ≤ Finset.card (Finset.image (fun z => Nat.sqrt (z + x)) s) := by
          apply Finset.card_le_card
          apply Finset.image_subset_iff.mpr
          intro z hz
          exact Nat.sqrt_pos.mpr (by linarith [h₁ z (hs hz), h₁ x (hs hx)])
        have h₁₂ : Finset.card (Finset.image (fun z => Nat.sqrt (z + x)) s) ≤ Nat.sqrt (4 * n) + 1 := by
          apply Finset.card_le_of_injOn
          intro z₁ hz₁ z₂ hz₂ h₁₃
          have h₁₄ : Nat.sqrt (z₁ + x) = Nat.sqrt (z₂ + x) := h₁₃
          have h₁₅ : z₁ + x = z₂ + x := by
            apply Nat.sqrt_inj (by linarith [h₁ z₁ (hs hz₁), h₁ x (hs hx)])
              (by linarith [h₁ z₂ (hs hz₂), h₁ x (hs hx)])
            exact h₁₄
          linarith
        linarith
      linarith
    by_contra! h₆
    exact h₆
  by_cases h₆ : Finset.card S > Nat.sqrt (4 * n)
  · exact Or.inl (h₅ S hS h₆)
  · have h₇ : Finset.card (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) = n + 1 - Finset.card S := by
      rw [Finset.card_sdiff hS]
      exact h₂
    have h₈ : n + 1 - Finset.card S > Nat.sqrt (4 * n) := by
      omega
    exact Or.inr (h₅ (Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S) (Finset.sdiff_subset _ _) h₈)

have h₁ : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) → n ≤ k ∧ k ≤ 2 * n := by
    intro k hk
    exact ⟨Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk |>.1, Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk |>.2⟩
  have h₂ : Finset.card (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)) = n + 1 := by
    simp [Finset.Icc_eq_empty_of_lt, hn]
  have h₃ : 2 * Nat.sqrt (4 * n) + 1 > n + 1 := by
    have h₄ : Nat.sqrt (4 * n) ≥ 2 * Nat.sqrt n := by
      apply Nat.le_sqrt_of_sq_le
      nlinarith [Nat.sqrt_le (4 * n), Nat.sqrt_le n]
    nlinarith [Nat.sqrt_le (4 * n), Nat.sqrt_le n, h₄]
  have h₄ : ∃ m : ℕ, m * m ∈ Set.Icc (2 * n) (4 * n) := by
    use Nat.sqrt (2 * n)
    constructor <;> nlinarith [Nat.sqrt_le (2 * n), Nat.lt_succ_sqrt (2 * n)]
  cases' h₄ with m hm
  have h₅ : m * m ≥ 2 * n := hm.1
  have h₆ : m * m ≤ 4 * n := hm.2
  have h₇ : ∃ a b : ℕ, a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) ∧ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) ∧ a ≠ b ∧ a + b = m * m := by
    use m * m - n, n
    constructor
    · constructor
      · nlinarith
      · nlinarith
    · constructor
      · constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
      · constructor
        · nlinarith
        · nlinarith
  cases' h₇ with a h₇
  cases' h₇ with b h₇
  cases' h₇ with ha hb
  cases' hb with hab hsum
  by_cases hS_a : a ∈ S
  · by_cases hS_b : b ∈ S
    · exact Or.inl ⟨a, ha.1, b, ha.2, hab, hsum ▸ rfl⟩
    · exact Or.inr ⟨b, by simp [hS_b, ha.2], a, by simp [hS_a, ha.1], hab.symm, hsum ▸ rfl⟩
  · by_cases hS_b : b ∈ S
    · exact Or.inr ⟨a, by simp [hS_a, ha.1], b, by simp [hS_b, ha.2], hab, hsum ▸ rfl⟩
    · exact Or.inr ⟨a, by simp [hS_a, ha.1], b, by simp [hS_b, ha.2], hab, hsum ▸ rfl⟩

have h₁ : Finset.Icc n (2 * n).card ≥ 101 := by
    rw [Finset.Icc_card]
    omega
  have h₂ : (Finset.Icc n (2 * n)).card = n + 1 := by
    rw [Finset.Icc_card]
    omega
  have h₃ : n + 1 ≥ 101 := by
    linarith
  have h₄ : n ≥ 100 := by
    linarith
  have h₅ : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) → k ≥ n := by
    intro k hk
    exact Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk |>.1
  have h₆ : ∀ k : ℕ, k ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) → k ≤ 2 * n := by
    intro k hk
    exact Finset.mem_Icc.mp hk |>.2
  let T := Finset.Icc n (2 * n)
  have h₇ : T.card ≥ 101 := by
    linarith
  have h₈ : ∀ x y : ℕ, x ∈ T → y ∈ T → x ≠ y → x + y ∈ Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n) := by
    intro x y hx hy hxy
    constructor <;> linarith [h₅ x hx, h₅ y hy, h₆ x hx, h₆ y hy]
  have h₉ : Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n).card ≤ 2 * n := by
    rw [Finset.Icc_card]
    omega
  have h₁₀ : (Finset.filter IsSquare (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n))).card ≤ 2 * Nat.sqrt (4 * n) := by
    calc
      (Finset.filter IsSquare (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n))).card ≤
          (Finset.filter IsSquare (Finset.Icc 1 (4 * n))).card := by
        apply Finset.card_filter_mono
        apply Finset.Icc_subset_Icc
        · omega
        · rfl
      _ ≤ 2 * Nat.sqrt (4 * n) := by
        have : (Finset.filter IsSquare (Finset.Icc 1 (4 * n))).card ≤ Nat.sqrt (4 * n) := by
          apply Finset.card_filter_le_of_inj_on
          · intro a ha b hb hab
            simp_all [IsSquare]
          · intro a ha
            obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := IsSquare_iff_exists_sq.mp (Finset.mem_filter.mp ha).1
            exact Nat.sqrt_le_sqrt (by nlinarith)
        omega
  have h₁₁ : 2 * Nat.sqrt (4 * n) < (T.card - 1) := by
    have : Nat.sqrt (4 * n) ≤ 2 * n := by
      apply Nat.sqrt_le_iff.mpr
      constructor <;> nlinarith
    nlinarith [h₇]
  have h₁₂ : (T.offDiag.image (fun p : ℕ × ℕ => p.1 + p.2)).card > (Finset.filter IsSquare (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n))).card := by
    have : T.offDiag.card = T.card * (T.card - 1) := by
      simp [Finset.offDiag_card]
    have : (T.offDiag.image (fun p => p.1 + p.2)).card ≤ T.offDiag.card := by
      apply Finset.card_image_le
    nlinarith [h₁₀, h₁₁]
  by_contra! h
  have h₁₃ : ∀ a ∈ S, ∀ b ∈ S, a ≠ b → ¬IsSquare (a + b) := by
    intro a ha b hb hab
    exact h.resolve_left ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, by assumption⟩
  have h₁₄ : ∀ a ∈ T \ S, ∀ b ∈ T \ S, a ≠ b → ¬IsSquare (a + b) := by
    intro a ha b hb hab
    exact h.resolve_right ⟨a, ha, b, hb, hab, by assumption⟩
  have h₁₅ : ∀ a ∈ T, ∀ b ∈ T, a ≠ b → ¬IsSquare (a + b) := by
    intro a ha b hb hab
    cases' em (a ∈ S) with haS haS <;> cases' em (b ∈ S) with hbS hbS <;>
      simp_all [Finset.mem_sdiff]
  have h₁₆ : (T.offDiag.image (fun p => p.1 + p.2)) ∩ (Finset.filter IsSquare (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n))) = ∅ := by
    ext x
    simp
    rintro ⟨⟨a, b, hab, ha, hb⟩, hx⟩
    exact h₁₅ a ha b hb hab hx
  have h₁₇ : (T.offDiag.image (fun p => p.1 + p.2)).card ≤ (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n)).card - (Finset.filter IsSquare (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n))).card := by
    calc
      (T.offDiag.image (fun p => p.1 + p.2)).card ≤ (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n)).card := by
        apply Finset.card_le_of_subset
        intro x hx
        obtain ⟨⟨a, b, hab, ha, hb⟩, rfl⟩ := Finset.mem_image.mp hx
        exact h₈ a b ha hb hab
      _ = (Finset.filter IsSquare (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n))).card +
          (Finset.filter (fun x => ¬IsSquare x) (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n))).card := by
        rw [Finset.card_filter_add_card_filter_compl]
      _ ≥ (Finset.filter IsSquare (Finset.Icc (2 * n + 1) (4 * n))).card := by
        apply le_add_of_nonneg_right
        apply Nat.zero_le
  nlinarith [h₁₂, h₁₇]
